ModMetaData.name: KotORFDP
ModMetaData.author: Caigoomballou
ModMetaData.description: Fixes for duplicated KotOR factions; Ideology duplicate CompStyleable on KotOR apparel (XML + optional Harmony under Optional_KotORApparelIdeologyStyleLoadFix); plus bundled KotOR droid compat sources (Death Rattle / RimPsyche / optional Nice Health Tab) under KotORDroidscompats.
